description_long: This vending machine is a tall, rectangular unit with a predominantly red lower body and a white upper section. The front features a coin slot, a lever, and a product retrieval slot, all arranged vertically. Above the main interface, there is a circular sign with a logo and the text 'JUGGER-NOG' in stylized letters, as well as a price indication of 10 cents. The machine has a slightly weathered appearance, with visible wear and some faded paint, suggesting it is an older or retro-style model. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or additional features. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on functionality and clear branding.
description: A retro-style red and white vending machine with a front coin slot, lever, and product retrieval slot, topped by a circular branded sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the coin slot, lever, product retrieval slot, price label, and prominent circular branding sign.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain red and white surface with the circular sign protruding at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless red and white back with the circular sign visible at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain surface and the circular sign at the top.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular printed area on the upper front, showing the product name 'JUGGER-NOG', price, and some faded text.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot located on the upper front, with a lever below it; no bill acceptor or card reader visible.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: None; no visible product selection buttons or keypad.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular slot with a flap located below the lever on the front face.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A large circular sign at the top front with a logo and the text 'JUGGER-NOG', and a printed area below with the same branding and price.
